# KisanAI Issue Bank

This file contains ready-to-use issues for contributors, organized by difficulty. Each entry includes title, description, labels, estimated effort, related files, and acceptance criteria. Maintainers can copy these into the issue tracker and assign contributors.

## Good First Issues (40)

1. **Improve README badges**
- Description: Update README badges to point to this repository, add meaningful shields and remove placeholders.
- Labels: `documentation`, `good first issue`
- Difficulty: Good First
- Estimated effort: 30-60 minutes
- Related files: `README.md`
- Acceptance criteria: README badge links use `asheesh109/KisanAI` and display build/license/contributing status.

2. **Add screenshot placeholders**
- Description: Add image placeholders to `public/demo.gif` and reference them in README Screenshots section.
- Labels: `documentation`, `good first issue`
- Difficulty: Good First
- Estimated effort: 30-60 minutes
- Related files: `public/`, `README.md`
- Acceptance criteria: Placeholder files added and README references updated.

3. **Fix broken links in docs**
- Description: Run a link check of top-level docs and fix broken links.
- Labels: `documentation`, `good first issue`
- Difficulty: Good First
- Estimated effort: 30-90 minutes
- Related files: `docs/*`, `README.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- Acceptance criteria: No internal broken links remain in checked files.

4. **Add CONTRIBUTING quickstart summary**
- Description: Add a one-paragraph quickstart at top of `CONTRIBUTING.md` for first-time contributors.
- Labels: `documentation`, `good first issue`
- Difficulty: Good First
- Estimated effort: 30-60 minutes
- Related files: `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- Acceptance criteria: `CONTRIBUTING.md` contains a short quickstart section with steps to make a first PR.

5. **Add issue templates examples**

- Difficulty: Good First
- Estimated effort: 30-90 minutes
- Related files: `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/*.md`
- Acceptance criteria: Each template includes an example section that contributors can copy.

7. **Add contributing contact info**

- Difficulty: Good First
- Estimated effort: 15-30 minutes

8. **Spellcheck docs**

- Difficulty: Good First
- Estimated effort: 30-90 minutes
- Related files: `docs/*`, `README.md`

## Intermediate (20)

1. **Add server-side pagination for schemes API**
- Description: Implement server-side pagination for the schemes endpoint to support large datasets.
- Labels: `backend`, `intermediate`
- Difficulty: Intermediate
- Estimated effort: 4-12 hours
- Related files: `src/app/api/schemes/*`, `src/lib/*`
- Acceptance criteria: API supports `page` and `limit` params; frontend handles pagination.

2. **Add rate-limited cache for market prices**
- Description: Implement caching layer for market prices responses to reduce third-party calls.
- Labels: `backend`, `intermediate`
- Difficulty: Intermediate
- Estimated effort: 6-16 hours
- Related files: `src/lib/marketData.ts`, `src/app/api/market-prices/*`
- Acceptance criteria: Cache works with TTL and respects rate limits.

- Labels: `typescript`, `intermediate`
- Difficulty: Intermediate
- Estimated effort: 3-8 hours
- Related files: `src/lib/utils.js` -> `src/lib/utils.ts`
- Acceptance criteria: File migrated and type-check passes.

- Difficulty: Intermediate
- Estimated effort: 6-16 hours
- Related files: `src/app/page.jsx`, `src/app/layout.jsx`, `tailwind.config.js`
- Acceptance criteria: Lighthouse score improves and PR documents changes.

12. **Add webhook for community events**
- Description: Add a GitHub App/webhook integration that triggers community workflows (docs/config only).
- Labels: `infrastructure`, `intermediate`
- Difficulty: Intermediate
- Estimated effort: 4-8 hours
- Related files: `.github/`, `docs/*`
- Acceptance criteria: Webhook configuration documented and sample payloads included.

13. **Add typed API client for frontend**
- Description: Introduce a small, typed API client wrapper for common endpoints.
- Labels: `typescript`, `intermediate`
- Difficulty: Intermediate
- Estimated effort: 6-12 hours
- Related files: `src/lib/api.ts`
- Acceptance criteria: Typed client added and used by one page.

14. **Add caching headers for static assets**
- Description: Update recommended hosting config to include proper caching headers for `public/` assets.
- Labels: `ops`, `intermediate`
- Difficulty: Intermediate
- Estimated effort: 2-4 hours
- Related files: `docs/DEPLOYMENT.md`
- Acceptance criteria: Hosting config examples updated.

15. **Add contribution analytics dashboard (docs only)**
- Description: Add a guide on how to track top contributors and contributions using GitHub insights.
- Labels: `documentation`, `intermediate`
- Difficulty: Intermediate
- Estimated effort: 3-6 hours
- Related files: `docs/*`
- Acceptance criteria: Dashboard guide added.

16. **Add internationalization test cases**
- Description: Add tests ensuring pages render expected translations for Hindi and English.
- Labels: `testing`, `intermediate`, `i18n`
- Difficulty: Intermediate
- Estimated effort: 4-8 hours
- Related files: `src/contexts/LanguageContext.js`, `src/__tests__/*`
- Acceptance criteria: Tests added and maintainers can run them locally.

17. **Add structured logging guidance**
- Description: Document structured logging format and examples for server-side logs.
- Labels: `documentation`, `intermediate`
- Difficulty: Intermediate
- Estimated effort: 2-4 hours
- Related files: `docs/DEPLOYMENT.md`, `src/lib/*`
- Acceptance criteria: Logging guidance added.

18. **Migrate build cache to recommended approach**
- Description: Document recommended build cache strategy for CI (Vercel/Netlify example configs).
- Labels: `ci`, `intermediate`
- Difficulty: Intermediate
- Estimated effort: 2-4 hours
- Related files: `docs/DEPLOYMENT.md`, `.github/workflows/ci.yml`
- Acceptance criteria: Cache approach documented.

19. **Add more robust feature flagging docs**
- Description: Document how to add runtime feature flags and experiment toggles.
- Labels: `documentation`, `intermediate`
- Difficulty: Intermediate
- Estimated effort: 3-6 hours
- Related files: `src/lib/*`, `docs/*`
- Acceptance criteria: Feature flag guide added.

20. **Create release checklist**
- Description: Add a maintainers' release checklist with steps to publish a release.
- Labels: `maintenance`, `intermediate`
- Difficulty: Intermediate
- Estimated effort: 2-4 hours
- Related files: `docs/RELEASE.md`, `package.json`
- Acceptance criteria: Release checklist created.

## Advanced (10)

1. **Architectural review and refactor plan**
- Description: Produce a detailed plan to refactor the app for large-scale maintainability (docs + proposal).
- Labels: `architecture`, `advanced`
- Difficulty: Advanced
- Estimated effort: 16-40 hours
- Related files: `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`, `src/*`
- Acceptance criteria: Proposal approved by maintainers and PR opened for initial changes.

2. **Add CI integration tests with real provider stubs**
- Description: Create integration tests that run against provider stubs for AI and TTS services.
- Labels: `testing`, `advanced`
- Difficulty: Advanced
- Estimated effort: 16-40 hours
- Related files: `tests/integration/*`, `mocks/*`
- Acceptance criteria: Integration tests added and documented (do not run in main CI without secrets).

3. **Add analytics and privacy compliance plan**
- Description: Design and implement a privacy-compliant analytics plan (GDPR, opt-out).
- Labels: `privacy`, `advanced`
- Difficulty: Advanced
- Estimated effort: 16-40 hours
- Related files: `docs/PRIVACY.md`, `src/*`
- Acceptance criteria: Plan documented and code scaffolding proposed.

4. **Scalable notification service design**
- Description: Design and document a scalable push/notification service for alerts and market updates.
- Labels: `architecture`, `advanced`
- Difficulty: Advanced
- Estimated effort: 16-40 hours
- Related files: `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`, `src/lib/*`
- Acceptance criteria: Design doc with architecture diagrams and cost estimates.

5. **End-to-end accessibility remediation**
- Description: Full accessibility audit and remediation plan across all major pages.
- Labels: `accessibility`, `advanced`
- Difficulty: Advanced
- Estimated effort: 40+ hours
- Related files: `src/components/*`, `docs/*`
- Acceptance criteria: Audit report and prioritized remediation plan.

6. **High-availability deployment guide**
- Description: Document a HA deployment architecture with failover, backups, and monitoring.
- Labels: `ops`, `advanced`
- Difficulty: Advanced
- Estimated effort: 16-40 hours
- Related files: `docs/DEPLOYMENT.md`
- Acceptance criteria: HA guide added with diagrams and runbook.

7. **Data migration strategy**
- Description: Design a migration plan for schema changes in MongoDB and IndexedDB.
- Labels: `database`, `advanced`
- Difficulty: Advanced
- Estimated effort: 16-40 hours
- Related files: `docs/DEPLOYMENT.md`, `src/lib/mongodb.ts`
- Acceptance criteria: Migration scripts and rollback plan documented.

8. **Comprehensive load testing plan**
- Description: Create a load testing harness and plan for scale testing (k6 or similar).
- Labels: `performance`, `advanced`
- Difficulty: Advanced
- Estimated effort: 16-40 hours
- Related files: `docs/PERFORMANCE.md`, `tools/load-tests/`
- Acceptance criteria: Load tests and runbook added.

9. **Security hardening checklist and audit**
- Description: Perform a security audit, add hardening steps and automated security tests to CI.
- Labels: `security`, `advanced`
- Difficulty: Advanced
- Estimated effort: 16-40 hours
- Related files: `SECURITY.md`, `.github/workflows/ci.yml`
- Acceptance criteria: Audit report and CI checks added.

10. **Implement an offline-first synchronization protocol**
- Description: Design and implement a robust sync protocol for offline edits and conflict resolution.
- Labels: `architecture`, `advanced`
- Difficulty: Advanced
- Estimated effort: 40+ hours
- Related files: `src/lib/indexedDB.ts`, `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`
- Acceptance criteria: Protocol documented and a proof-of-concept implementation provided.
# Issue Bank (sample)

This file contains pre-curated issues suitable for new contributors. Use these as starting points for good-first-issues and onboarding.

Sample Good First Issues
1. Improve translations for `schemes` page — verify placeholders and alt text.
2. Add unit tests for `useSchemeFilter` hook covering state-edge cases.
3. Add missing aria-labels to scheme cards for better screen-reader support.

Beginner Issues
- Add a short guide in `docs/LOCAL_SETUP.md` about environment variables.
- Create a CONTRIBUTING checklist for code style and commit messages.

Intermediate / Advanced
- Integrate a lightweight caching layer for market price API with expiry.
- Add E2E tests for the eligibility checker using Playwright.

How to claim an issue
- Comment on the issue and assign yourself; follow contribution guide.
# Issue Bank — Curated Tasks for Contributors

This file contains curated issues across difficulty levels to help contributors get started. Each entry includes title, description, labels, difficulty, estimated effort, acceptance criteria, and related files.

---

## Good First Issues (40)
